name: goalbuddy
description: Turn broad Codex and Claude Code work into pressured /goal runs with oracles, local boards, receipts, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Goal oracles, local boards, receipts, and proof loops for /goal
interface.longDescription: GoalBuddy packages a structured goal workflow for broad, long-running, or ambiguous engineering work in Codex or Claude Code. It creates durable goal charters, goal oracles, task boards, optional depth-1 subgoals, local board surfaces, parallel-agent-ready handoffs, receipts, verification gates, and compatibility guidance for teams moving from goal-maker.
defaultPrompt: $goal-prep prepare a GoalBuddy board for this goal
